characters.name: Marcus Vance
characters.mask: A mid-level L3 junior developer seeking anonymity and simple tasks.
characters.trueNature: A brilliant, perfectionist L9 Chief Architect who cannot tolerate incompetence or bad systems.

characters.name: Richard Sterling
characters.mask: A decisive, authoritative CEO in control of his company.
characters.trueNature: An insecure, incompetent leader who relies on others to fix his mistakes while posturing for the board.

characters.name: Evelyn Vance
characters.trueNature: A pragmatic opportunist who values results and talent over corporate hierarchy and loyalty.

pressureChoices.pressure: The company database is crashing, and the CTO is about to perform a destructive hard-reset.
pressureChoices.choiceA: Stay hidden and maintain his peaceful anonymity as an L3.
pressureChoices.choiceB: Intervene, fix the system, and blow his cover as a former L9 architect.
pressureChoices.chosen: Intervene, fix the system, and blow his cover as a former L9 architect.

pressureChoices.pressure: Evelyn offers him the Chief Architect role after he reveals his identity.
pressureChoices.choiceA: Refuse the role and return to his quiet life, leaving the engineers to suffer.
pressureChoices.choiceB: Accept the role, sacrificing his peace to save the engineers and fix the architecture.
pressureChoices.chosen: Accept the role, sacrificing his peace to save the engineers and fix the architecture.

dimensions.positive: takes ownership of systemic failures to protect others
dimensions.negative: hides his true potential to avoid the burdens of leadership

dimensions.positive: projects the image of a strong, decisive CEO
dimensions.negative: lacks the technical understanding to manage his own company

emotionalMoments.trigger: realizing the engineers are suffocating under bad management and he is the only one who can help.
being publicly corrected and undermined by his own employee in front of the board.

desires.consciousDesire: A quiet, low-stress life with simple Jira tickets.
desires.subconsciousDesire: The intellectual satisfaction of solving complex problems and mentoring others.

desires.consciousDesire: Maintain control and authority over his company.
desires.subconsciousDesire: Validation from the board and the appearance of success.

desires.consciousDesire: Fix the company's backend and protect her investment.
desires.subconsciousDesire: Control over the most talented assets in the industry.
